rows.content: PERSISTENT INSERT+- Specifies whether to reset the Insert mode after
executing a command.  If set to Y, Insert remains set after command
execution.  If N, Insert is reset everytime an enter key is pressed
SCROLL INDICATORS+- Specifies whether to display the  and  table
scroll indicators when there are table records off the screen.
If Y, display the indicators.  N specifies no display.
MOUSE CURSOR+- Specifies whether to display the mouse cursor.  If
Y, then the mouse cursor is always displayed as a inverted block
of text on the screen.  If N, then no cursor is displayed, and
DISPLAY TIME/DATE+- Specifies whether to display the time and/or date
on the status line at the bottom of the screen.  Enter B for both
time and date, T for just time, D for just date, or N to disable
